projectDescription: An indie, open-source browser-based 3D dog game built with Three.js and Web Audio API where you play as Rudi the dog collecting treats across 20 unique worlds.
keyFeatures: 20 unique themed worlds (bedroom, lava islands, neon city, candy forest, pirate deck, etc.)
Low-poly 3D dog character (Rudi) built entirely with Three.js geometry
5 power-up types: speed stack (blue), size up (yellow), size down (red), multi-clone (rainbow), single clone (cyan)
Zoomies mode with toggleable speed burst and speed stacks
Clone AI system that mirrors Rudi's movement
Unique procedurally-played Web Audio API music per level (10 music themes cycling across 20 levels)
Touch joystick controls for mobile/tablet play
Camera drag controls for orbit around Rudi
Two ending sequences: fly-away ending and meteor ending
Local and optional Firebase-backed global leaderboard with completion time tracking
publicApiSurface: makeRoom(level) — generates level geometry based on levelThemes array
spawnLevel(level) — spawns treats, power-ups, and room for a given level
collectTreat(t, collectedByClone) — handles treat collection logic and scoring
createClone() — spawns a clone of Rudi that follows AI movement
triggerFlyAwayEnding() — initiates the fly-away ending sequence
triggerMeteorEnding() — initiates the meteor ending sequence
applyLevelMusic(level) — switches background music based on level index
openLeaderboard() — fetches and renders the leaderboard panel
resetGameToMenu() — resets all game state and returns to title screen
levelThemes[] — array of 20 level theme objects with floor/wall/sky colors and map type
musicThemes[] — array of 10 music theme objects with chord progressions and melody
